[{"title": "[DEEP] Waste less, sell more - how one startup is using AI to transform food retail", "url": "https://www.weforum.org/stories/2021/06/wasteless-ai-retail-food-waste/", "snippet": "Title: Waste less, sell more - how one startup is using AI to transform food retail URL Source: https://www.weforum.org/stories/2021/06/wasteless-ai-retail-food-waste/ Markdown Content: *   We each throw out 74kg (163 lbs) of food waste per person, per year. *   UN Sustainable Development Goals aim for 50% less food waste by 2030. *   AI software is shown to reduce supermarket food waste by a third. *   Tech startup Wasteless is using AI to cut down on food waste. *   Wasteless is a member of The Circulars Accelerator Cohort 2021 on UpLink. Admit it. We\u2019ve all thrown good food away. It looked perfect in the supermarket. The ripe fruit or vegetables, the prime meat, the nutritious dairy products. But when past its peak - maybe it was close to the \u201cbest-before\u201d date, into the garbage it goes. We throw out 74kg (163 lbs) of food annually per man, woman and child on the planet, while two billion of the world\u2019s people suffer from hunger or undernourishment. In total 1.3 billion tonnes, or a third of all the world\u2019s food produced, is wasted every year. With the challenge of ending global hunger in mind, the UN incorporated a target of [halving global food waste by 2030](http://www.fao.org/sustainable-development-goals/indicators/1231/en/) into the Sustainable Development Goals. ##### Have you read? *   ##### [What are food crises and how many people are affected by them?](https://www.weforum.org/stories/2021/05/global-food-crises-report-conflict-2021/) *   ##### [A Better Future for Food \u2013 Public Forum of the UN Food Systems Summit](https://www.weforum.org/stories/2021/05/food-systems-summit-lever-of-change-second-innovation-public-forum/) *   ##### [What can consumers do to help solve the climate change crisis?](https://www.weforum.org/stories/2021/02/consumers-help-solve-climate-change/) **The foods we throw away** [![Image 1: a chart showing that 76% of surplus food comes from perishable items](https://assets.weforum.org/editor/kwMCsarbpt-MnPlvI_xIkdOcLAdm8dK1SDpnhUeOtbs.png)](https://refed.com/food-waste/the-challenge/?sort=economic-value-per-ton)\n...\nTitle: Waste less, sell more - how one startup is using AI to transform food retail URL Source: https://www.weforum.org/stories/2021/06/wasteless-ai-retail-food-waste/ Markdown Content: *   We each throw out 74kg (163 lbs) of food waste per person, per year. *   UN Sustainable Development Goals aim for 50% less food waste by 2030. *   AI software is shown to reduce supermarket food waste by a third. *   Tech startup Wasteless is using AI to cut down on food waste. *   Wasteless is a member of The Circulars Accelerator Cohort 2021 on UpLink. Admit it. We\u2019ve all thrown good food away. It looked perfect in the supermarket. The ripe fruit or vegetables, the prime meat, the nutritious dairy products. But when past its peak - maybe it was close to the \u201cbest-before\u201d date, into the garbage it goes. We throw out 74kg (163 lbs) of food annually per man, woman and child on the planet, while two billion of the world\u2019s people suffer from hunger or undernourishment. In total 1.3 billion tonnes, or a third of all the world\u2019s food produced, is wasted every year. With the challenge of ending global hunger in mind, the UN incorporated a target of [halving global food waste by 2030](http://www.fao.org/sustainable-development-goals/indicators/1231/en/) into the Sustainable Development Goals. ##### Have you read? *   ##### [What are food crises and how many people are affected by them?](https://www.weforum.org/s...", "is_deep": true}, {"title": "The Most Promising Technologies for Reducing Food Waste Throughout the Supply Chain", "url": "https://www.agriculture.com/news/technology/the-most-promising-technologies-for-reducing-food-waste-throughout-the-supply-chain", "snippet": "July 17, 2020 -Israeli startupWasteless has developed a proprietary dynamic pricing algorithm for products with a limited expiration date. It allows retailers to fix and display discount prices across the demand curve and to discount items that are nearing ...", "is_deep": false}, {"title": "Three Ways AI Is Driving Reductions in Food Loss and Waste", "url": "https://refed.org/articles/three-ways-ai-is-driving-reductions-in-food-loss-and-waste/", "snippet": "For example, Strella offers a solution to support banana ripening through the use of proprietary sensors and machine learning to approximate the stage of ripening; then it issues recommendations that help ripeners improve consistency of color and maintain banana shelf life.", "is_deep": false}, {"title": "Prevent Wasted Food Through Source Reduction | US EPA", "url": "https://www.epa.gov/sustainable-management-food/prevent-wasted-food-through-source-reduction", "snippet": "December 12, 2025 -Sodexo deploys its proprietary waste reduction program to track and automatically analyze data in its kitchens. The data gives clear insight into what a kitchen is wasting and why.", "is_deep": false}]
